## Visual Style & Aesthetic

### Background & Setting
- Rich, dark walnut wood surface with natural grain texture
- Luxurious bar counter / high-end home bar aesthetic
- Professional depth of field with background blur
- Premium hospitality presentation

### Lighting Design
- Warm color temperature (2700K-3200K) for inviting ambiance
- Soft, diffused lighting from above-left creating natural shadows
- Rim lighting on glass edges for premium feel
- Golden hour mood with warm backlighting

### Composition Principles
- Rule of thirds for balanced visual flow
- Hero product (simple syrup) center-left
- Supporting products arranged for eye movement
- Premium gifting and luxury presentation aesthetic
- Austin, Texas craft cocktail culture vibe
- Balance of rustic wood and refined glassware

## Brand Alignment

This image perfectly matches Party On Delivery's luxury brand aesthetic:
- Sophisticated and distinguished visual tone
- Premium quality presentation
- Elegant, old-fashioned aesthetic (matching site design)

## Technical Specifications

- **Format:** WebP (optimized for web)
- **File Size:** 178 KB
- **Generation Method:** Gemini 2.5 Flash Image Preview via OpenRouter
- **Multimodal Input:** 4 real product photos + AI composition
- **Tool:** Custom image-generator-tool (NPX/TSX CLI)
